title: Email thread — install for Sagebrush Properties
body:
From: Jared Jennings (Sagebrush Properties)
To: Nadia Carr
Date: 2026-02-21
Subject: Install completion

The install for Sagebrush Properties is scheduled for February 21, 2026, with Nadia Carr assigned as the technician.

From: Nadia Carr
To: Jared Jennings (Sagebrush Properties)
Date: 2026-02-22
Subject: Re: Install completion

Please confirm that the install for Sagebrush Properties is complete; the job details are two units at $343.98 each, for a total amount of $687.96.

From: Jared Jennings (Sagebrush Properties)
To: Nadia Carr
Date: 2026-02-23
Subject: Re: Install completion

The install for Sagebrush Properties is complete. The recorded quantity is 2, the unit price is $343.98, and the total amount is $687.96.

From: Nadia Carr
To: Jared Jennings (Sagebrush Properties)
Date: 2026-02-24
Subject: Re: Install completion

The install for Sagebrush Properties was completed by Nadia Carr in 2026, with 2 units at $343.98 each and a total amount of $687.96.
